---
title: "alltrails_NP"
author: "Evanna Yang"
date: "2026-05-15"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---


```{r}
# 1. Load the raw data
df <- read.csv("alltrails-data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 2. Drop the "visitor_usage" column
df_clean$visitor_usage <- NULL

# 3. Fix the Geographic Errors
df_clean$state_name[df_clean$state_name == "Maui"] <- "Hawaii"
df_clean$country_name <- NULL

# 4. Add Unit Conversion Variables
df_clean$length_mile <- df_clean$length * 0.000621371
df_clean$elevation_gain_ft <- df_clean$elevation_gain * 3.28084

# 5. Filter out placeholder rows (length == 0)
df_clean <- subset(df_clean, length > 0)

# 6. Save the clean dataset to a new CSV file
write.csv(df_clean, "alltrails_cleaned.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Data cleaned and 'visitor_usage' column successfully dropped!\n")
```
